scripts.start: npm run build:pyx:all && concurrently "expo start" "npm run next:dev" "npm run watch:pyx:all"
scripts.android: npm run build:pyx:all && concurrently "expo start --android" "npm run next:dev" "npm run watch:pyx:all"
scripts.ios: npm run build:pyx:all && concurrently "expo start --ios" "npm run next:dev" "npm run watch:pyx:all"
scripts.web: npm run build:pyx:all && concurrently "expo start --web" "npm run next:dev" "npm run watch:pyx:all"
scripts.start:web: npm run build:pyx:web && concurrently --names "next,pyx" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run next:dev" "npm run watch:pyx:web"
scripts.build:pyx:all: npm run build:pyx && npm run build:pyx:web
